title: health_endpoint_returns_status_ok
description: Send GET to /api/v1/health. Assert HTTP 200. Assert JSON has 'status' equal to 'ok', 'version' as a non-empty string, and 'uptime' as a positive number.

title: api_root_lists_available_endpoints
description: Send GET to /api/v1/. Assert HTTP 200. Assert JSON has 'version' as string, 'baseUrl' as string, and 'endpoints' as a non-empty array where each item has 'method', 'path', and 'description' keys.

title: analyze_small_npm_package
description: Send GET to /api/v1/package/is-odd. Assert HTTP 200. Assert JSON has: source='npm', packageName='is-odd', packageVersion as non-empty string, gzipSize as positive integer, installSize as positive integer, fileCount as positive integer, typeBreakdown as non-empty dict with string keys and integer values, dependencies as array, dependencyCount as non-negative integer, hasESM as boolean, hasCJS as boolean, hasTypes as boolean, license as string, downloadTime as dict with keys '4g' and 'wifi' and 'gbit', cachedAt as non-empty string.

title: analyze_scoped_npm_package
description: Send GET to /api/v1/package/@sindresorhus/is. Assert HTTP 200. Assert JSON has source='npm', packageName='@sindresorhus/is', gzipSize as positive integer, installSize as positive integer, typeBreakdown as non-empty dict.

title: analyze_nonexistent_package_returns_error
description: Send GET to /api/v1/package/this-package-does-not-exist-xyz-999. Assert HTTP status is 404 or 500. Assert JSON has 'error' as a non-empty string and 'message' as a non-empty string.

title: compare_two_packages_returns_diff
description: Send GET to /api/v1/compare?a=is-odd&b=is-even. Assert HTTP 200. Assert JSON has 'a' as dict with keys packageName, gzipSize, installSize. Assert JSON has 'b' as dict with keys packageName, gzipSize, installSize. Assert JSON has 'diff' as dict with keys gzipSize (integer), installSize (integer), dependencyCount (integer), smaller (string, one of 'a', 'b', 'equal').

title: compare_missing_params_returns_400
description: Send GET to /api/v1/compare (without query params). Assert HTTP 400. Assert JSON has error='MISSING_PARAMS'.

title: badge_returns_svg_for_gzip
description: Send GET to /badge/is-odd?type=gzip. Assert HTTP 200. Assert Content-Type header contains 'image/svg+xml'. Assert response body is a string containing '<svg'.

title: badge_returns_svg_for_install_size
description: Send GET to /badge/is-odd?type=install. Assert HTTP 200. Assert Content-Type header contains 'image/svg+xml'. Assert response body is a string containing '<svg'.

title: cached_response_returns_cache_hit_header
description: Send GET to /api/v1/package/is-odd twice. On the second request, assert the response header X-Cache equals 'HIT'. Both requests should return HTTP 200.
